name: 0451-research-skills
description: A collection of skills for AI agents focused on research: paper discovery, reading, note-taking, and research-grounded planning techniques.

plugins.name: uncertainty-quantification-conactu
plugins.description: Structured uncertainty quantification for agent outputs. CONACTU 4-axis confidence framework: Evidence, Model Fidelity, Completeness, Stability.

plugins.name: embodied-agent-planning
plugins.description: Embodied agent planning with integrated safety intention (SI) scoring and orthogonal feasibility+safety checks. For robots, vehicles, drones, game agents.

plugins.name: arxiv
plugins.description: Search and retrieve academic papers from arXiv using their free REST API. No API key needed. Search by keyword, author, category, or ID.

plugins.name: arxiv-research-to-agent-notes
plugins.description: Process arXiv PDFs into agent-notes — pymupdf4llm conversion, spawn 1 researcher per paper, max 3 concurrent, commit plans immediately.

plugins.name: llm-wiki
plugins.description: Karpathy's LLM Wiki — build and maintain a persistent, interlinked markdown knowledge base from LLM-related sources.

plugins.name: research-paper-to-agent-plan
plugins.description: Convert research PDFs to markdown (pymupdf4llm, not marker on M4), spawn researcher sub-agents, commit plans to agent-notes.

plugins.name: agent-delegation-strategy
plugins.description: When and how to delegate non-trivial work to specialized persona sub-agents. Covers delegation triggers, context preparation, and result synthesis.

plugins.name: embodied-safety-eval
plugins.description: Safety evaluation for embodied agent plans — pre-execution checks for plans involving physical actions, tool use, or environment modification.

plugins.name: faberlens-hardened-skills
plugins.description: Apply Faberlens behavioral safety hardening to skills by comparing against the hardened-skills repo and selectively adopting guardrails.

plugins.name: metacognitive-mro-prompts
plugins.description: Metacognitive monitoring and regulation prompts — MRO self-awareness loops, bias detection, mid-execution plan revision.

plugins.name: persona-adversarial-review
plugins.description: Adversarial red-team persona — find failure modes, stress-test assumptions, play devil's advocate.

plugins.name: persona-engineer
plugins.description: Implementation persona — build working code with tests, practical and opinionated.

plugins.name: persona-inspector
plugins.description: QA/inspection persona — verification, anti-pattern detection, challenge gate.

plugins.name: persona-researcher
plugins.description: Research persona — deep dives, literature synthesis, domain reconnaissance.

plugins.name: psmas-dag-to-phases
plugins.description: Transform PSMAS DAGs of tasks into executable phases with checkpoint validation. For complex multi-step plans with dependency verification.

plugins.name: safety-intention-checker
plugins.description: Evaluate whether a task request reflects benign, ambiguous, or potentially harmful intention before taking action.

plugins.name: self-refinement-loop
plugins.description: Self-refinement loop using MRO three-role factorization — Monitor/Reasoner/Controller for iterative response improvement.
